# Task 1: Add TypeScript Types for Explore VOC API

**From plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-21-voc-idea-generator.md

## What to do

Add new TypeScript types in `webapp/frontend/src/types.ts` after the `EnrichVocResponse` interface (after line 56):

```typescript
/** A single VOC idea generated by AI */
export interface VocIdea {
  voc: string
  why: string
}

/** /api/explore-voc 的响应 */
export interface ExploreVocResponse {
  ideas: VocIdea[]
  warning?: string
}
```

## Verification

Run: `cd webapp/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit`
Expected: no errors

## Commit format

```
feat: add VocIdea and ExploreVocResponse types
```
